evaluators.name: Cheapest Qualifying Web Hosting Plan Checkout Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies the user filtered hosting plans correctly, added a single qualifying plan to the cart on a monthly cycle, and proceeded to checkout with the cheapest qualifying plan.

evaluators.name: Video Production Quote Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a video production quote request for an ~90-second promo in New York City with on-site filming, a budget up to $8,000, and included contact information and 4K quality.

evaluators.name: Earliest Website Redesign Consultation Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies the user booked the earliest available 30-minute online website redesign consultation next calendar week between 2–5 PM with company size 11–50 employees.

evaluators.name: Digital Marketing Bundle and Proposal Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a bundle with the correct SEO, social media, and blog plans under $900/month following the specified strategy, and requested a proposal for that bundle.

evaluators.name: Retail IT & Video Case Study Sales Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Ensures the user contacted sales from the first retail case study that includes both IT support and video production services.

evaluators.name: Newest Cloud Backup Help Article Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user opened the most recent cloud backup help article under the cloud services topic and saved it to a reading list.

evaluators.name: High-Priority Email Migration Support Ticket Evaluator
evaluators.description: Verifies that the user submitted a high-priority support ticket as an existing customer about a stalled email migration under the email & collaboration category.

evaluators.name: RMM Lowest-Priced Qualifying Plan Trial Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user started a free trial for the lowest-priced RMM plan that supports at least 25 devices and costs under $600/month, providing business details.
